columnDataChange.oldValue: @SQL=select case when sum(fpsd.amount)=co.GrandTotal then 'N' else 'Y' end from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@ and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40 group by co.GrandTotal
columnDataChange.newValue: @SQL=WITH order_co AS ( SELECT GrandTotal, c_order_id FROM c_order WHERE c_order_id = @c_order_id@ ), payment_doc AS ( SELECT array_agg(value) AS status_list FROM ad_ref_list WHERE ad_reference_id = '575BCB88A4694C27BC013DE9C73E6FE7' AND COALESCE(seqno,40) >= 40 ) SELECT CASE WHEN sum(fpsd.amount) = max(co.GrandTotal) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd JOIN fin_payment_detail fpd ON fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id = fpd.fin_payment_detail_id JOIN fin_payment fp ON fpd.fin_payment_id = fp.fin_payment_id JOIN fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order JOIN order_co co ON co.c_order_id = ps.c_order_id JOIN payment_doc pd ON 1 = 1 WHERE ps.c_order_id = @c_order_id@ AND fp.status = ANY(pd.status_list)

columnDataChange.oldValue: @SQL=select case when ps.outstandingamt <> 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@ and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40 group by co.GrandTotal, ps.outstandingamt, ps.c_order_id
columnDataChange.newValue: @SQL=WITH payment_doc AS ( SELECT array_agg(value) AS status_list FROM ad_ref_list WHERE ad_reference_id = '575BCB88A4694C27BC013DE9C73E6FE7' AND COALESCE(seqno,40) >= 40 ) SELECT CASE WHEN max(ps.outstandingamt) <> 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd JOIN fin_payment_detail fpd ON fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id = fpd.fin_payment_detail_id JOIN fin_payment fp ON fpd.fin_payment_id = fp.fin_payment_id JOIN fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order JOIN payment_doc pd ON 1 = 1 WHERE ps.c_order_id = @c_order_id@ AND fp.status = ANY(pd.status_list)

columnDataChange.oldValue: @SQL=select case when sum(fpsd.amount)=ci.GrandTotal then 'N' else 'Y' end from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice join c_invoice ci on ci.c_invoice_id=ps.c_invoice_id WHERE ps.c_invoice_id =@c_invoice_id@ and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40 group by ci.GrandTotal
columnDataChange.newValue: @SQL=WITH invoice_ci AS ( SELECT GrandTotal, c_invoice_id FROM c_invoice WHERE c_invoice_id = @c_invoice_id@ ), payment_doc AS ( SELECT array_agg(value) AS status_list FROM ad_ref_list WHERE ad_reference_id = '575BCB88A4694C27BC013DE9C73E6FE7' AND COALESCE(seqno,40) >= 40 ) SELECT CASE WHEN sum(fpsd.amount) = max(ci.GrandTotal) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd JOIN fin_payment_detail fpd ON fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id = fpd.fin_payment_detail_id JOIN fin_payment fp ON fpd.fin_payment_id = fp.fin_payment_id JOIN fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice JOIN invoice_ci ci ON ci.c_invoice_id = ps.c_invoice_id JOIN payment_doc pd ON 1 = 1 WHERE ps.c_invoice_id = @c_invoice_id@ AND fp.status = ANY(pd.status_list)

columnDataChange.oldValue: @SQL=select case when ps.outstandingamt <> 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@ and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40 group by co.GrandTotal, ps.outstandingamt, ps.c_order_id
columnDataChange.newValue: @SQL=WITH payment_doc AS ( SELECT array_agg(value) AS status_list FROM ad_ref_list WHERE ad_reference_id = '575BCB88A4694C27BC013DE9C73E6FE7' AND COALESCE(seqno,40) >= 40 ) SELECT CASE WHEN max(ps.outstandingamt) <> 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd JOIN fin_payment_detail fpd ON fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id = fpd.fin_payment_detail_id JOIN fin_payment fp ON fpd.fin_payment_id = fp.fin_payment_id JOIN fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order JOIN payment_doc pd ON 1 = 1 WHERE ps.c_order_id = @c_order_id@ AND fp.status = ANY(pd.status_list)

columnDataChange.oldValue: @SQL=select case when sum(fpsd.amount)=co.GrandTotal then 'N' else 'Y' end from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order join c_order co on co.c_order_id=ps.c_order_id WHERE ps.c_order_id =@c_order_id@ and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40 group by co.GrandTotal
columnDataChange.newValue: @SQL=WITH order_co AS ( SELECT GrandTotal, c_order_id FROM c_order WHERE c_order_id = @c_order_id@ ), payment_doc AS ( SELECT array_agg(value) AS status_list FROM ad_ref_list WHERE ad_reference_id = '575BCB88A4694C27BC013DE9C73E6FE7' AND COALESCE(seqno,40) >= 40 ) SELECT CASE WHEN sum(fpsd.amount) = max(co.GrandTotal) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd JOIN fin_payment_detail fpd ON fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id = fpd.fin_payment_detail_id JOIN fin_payment fp ON fpd.fin_payment_id = fp.fin_payment_id JOIN fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_order JOIN order_co co ON co.c_order_id = ps.c_order_id JOIN payment_doc pd ON 1 = 1 WHERE ps.c_order_id = @c_order_id@ AND fp.status = ANY(pd.status_list)

columnDataChange.oldValue: @SQL=select case when sum(fpsd.amount)=ci.GrandTotal then 'N' else 'Y' end from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice join c_invoice ci on ci.c_invoice_id=ps.c_invoice_id WHERE ps.c_invoice_id =@c_invoice_id@ and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40 group by ci.GrandTotal
columnDataChange.newValue: @SQL=WITH invoice_ci AS ( SELECT GrandTotal, c_invoice_id FROM c_invoice WHERE c_invoice_id = @c_invoice_id@ ), payment_doc AS ( SELECT array_agg(value) AS status_list FROM ad_ref_list WHERE ad_reference_id = '575BCB88A4694C27BC013DE9C73E6FE7' AND COALESCE(seqno,40) >= 40 ) SELECT CASE WHEN sum(fpsd.amount) = max(ci.GrandTotal) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd JOIN fin_payment_detail fpd ON fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id = fpd.fin_payment_detail_id JOIN fin_payment fp ON fpd.fin_payment_id = fp.fin_payment_id JOIN fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice JOIN invoice_ci ci ON ci.c_invoice_id = ps.c_invoice_id JOIN payment_doc pd ON 1 = 1 WHERE ps.c_invoice_id = @c_invoice_id@ AND fp.status = ANY(pd.status_list)
